inputs.label: Urgency Score (1-10)
inputs.businessContext: Rating of how urgent the task is, 1 being not urgent, 10 extremely urgent.

inputs.label: Importance Score (1-10)
inputs.businessContext: Rating of how important the task is, 1 being not important, 10 extremely important.

inputs.label: Urgency Weight
inputs.businessContext: Weight assigned to urgency in the priority score calculation. Typically between 0 and 1.

inputs.label: Importance Weight
inputs.businessContext: Weight assigned to importance in the priority score calculation. Typically between 0 and 1.
